label: Futures Trade Panel
description: Futures order entry form shown after selecting a contract. Supports leverage, margin mode, and limit/market orders.

0.1.note: — WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.5.note: — widget file does not import from lib/mocks/.

0.6.note: — context (options-data-context.tsx) exposes no isLoading field; synchronous mock data; loading state cannot be wired at widget level without context changes.

0.7.note: — TradePanel renders 'Click a row to select' when instrument is null (selectedFuture === null); widget also shows instructional hint text above TradePanel.

0.8.note: — context exposes no error field; error state cannot be wired at widget level without context changes.

l0.notes: 0.1 pass — WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2 pass — requiredEntitlements: ['options-trading']. 0.3 pass — availableOn: ['options']. 0.4 pass — no any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5 pass — widget file does not import from lib/mocks/. 0.6 finding — context (options-data-context.tsx) exposes no isLoading field; synchronous mock data; loading state cannot be wired at widget level without context changes. 0.7 pass — TradePanel renders 'Click a row to select' when instrument is null (selectedFuture === null); widget also shows instructional hint text above TradePanel. 0.8 finding — context exposes no error field; error state cannot be wired at widget level without context changes. 0.9 pass — no dead code.

1.1.note: — widget reads selectedFuture exclusively from useOptionsData().

1.3.note: — futures trade panel is an order entry form; scope org filter does not directly affect selected future instrument display.

1.4.note: — no client filter applicable to trade panel.

1.6.note: — pure order entry; no data list to filter.

1.7.note: — no reference data in widget file; TradePanel sub-component uses mock fixtures (outside widget file scope).

l1.notes: 1.1 pass — widget reads selectedFuture exclusively from useOptionsData(). 1.2 pass — options-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() (line 130). 1.3 N/A — futures trade panel is an order entry form; scope org filter does not directly affect selected future instrument display. 1.4 N/A — no client filter applicable to trade panel. 1.5 N/A — no strategy filter applicable. 1.6 N/A — pure order entry; no data list to filter. 1.7 pass — no reference data in widget file; TradePanel sub-component uses mock fixtures (outside widget file scope).

knownIssues: context does not expose isLoading or error fields — loading/error states at widget level require context update
TradePanel sub-component imports directly from lib/mocks/fixtures/options-futures-mock (outside widget file scope)
findings: 0.6 — isLoading: context has no loading field; synchronous mock data generation means no async loading path exists
0.8 — error: context has no error field; error propagation from data layer not wired
